creator: fax@nohik.ee
text:
When server is up about 10 or more days and if I do restart to telegraf service then result is kernel panic. I don't think that this is telegraf itself related but telegraf is a "good" trigger. As far I have tried to reproduce this crash, I have noticed that this happens most of the times on machines with AMD cpu (for example EPYC 7443, EPYC 9354P, EPYC 7282).
I'm not sure, but this panic happens with FreeBSD 14.0 and 14.1 (not tested on 14.2).

Here is crash data:
